linkedin_profile.headline: Head Of Technology Delivery - Clermont Hotel Group
linkedin_profile.about: Total Experience: 14 years and 10 months

experience.title: Divisional IT Manager
experience.description: Divisional IT Manager for the UK’s largest multi branded hotel group, I oversee the operations and infrastructure for the entire group, with a small team of specialist. I Manage and support all hotel IT requirements which spans 60 Properties and over 2500 employees including the Internal Infrastructure for all Finance, Property and Email systems. Strategy and planning Define, update and implement strategies for IT infrastructure, including production and local environments, IT software and systems, including architecture, integration, procurement. Operating processes and methodologies. Align IT objectives and programmes to company objectives and strategies. Future-proof the company’s operational and physical infrastructure through on-going planning, budgeting, forecasting, and resource building. Production systems Define and deliver on standards, architectures, KPIs, organisational requirements.Design and implement scalable processes and methodologies to optimise reliability and performance, minimise outages, rectify such outages as may occur efficiently and quickly. Ensure that the Company delivers against its SLAs. Internal systems Ensure that the company’s internal systems support efficiently and scalable operations across all business areas and geographies. Identify operational needs and issues and resolve accordingly. Provide management team with KPIs for the measurement and analysis of internal processes and systems. Budgets and Procurement Acquire software / hardware as appropriate. Select, manage and control IT providers as appropriate. Manage IT application portfolio. Productivity Align the IT teams with enterprise performance objectives. Optimise costs of services through a mix of internal and external resources. Leadership Develop and articulate the IT vision to executive teams and the Board. Line-manage all infrastructure, technical operations and systems support staff.

experience.title: Senior Systems Analyst
experience.description: Responsible for the delivery of effective and efficient IT management for London's largest hotel management company Work with colleagues and clients/users in specifying information flows,processes/procedures, and data objects that will meet the business requirements. Manage all business system suppliers in relation to their contracts and Service Level Agreements. Manage the tendering, onboarding, contractual agreements and rollout of new IT providers and technologies. Driving the RFP processes of vendor selection in solutions required against the business defined requirements. Collects data on aspects of services delivered, which are quantified in the service level agreement and/or operational level agreement, including the reliability and maintainability of service components. Accountable for developing and implementing IT strategies designed to support the current and future growth of business Demonstrating strong financial acumen in successfully delivering effective budget control and financial forecasting in support of business. Demonstrating strong communication skills in delivering presentations regarding IT vision to Executive Teams and the Board. Working as an architect in solutionizing the environment to fit specific needs of the business in all functions. Producing and applying scalable processes and methodologies to optimise reliability and performance, able to provide solutions to arising issues. Manage the company's multiple data centres and connectivity throughout the estate. Manage the hosting and support of the company websites with the Marketing Department. Collaborating with internal senior management team to ensure business requirements are met, accountable for implementing strategies for IT infrastructure and IT software & systems. Devising and implementing Key Performance Indicators, executing successful performance management.

linkedin_profile.headline: Director of Sales | Sales, Hotels, Hospitality Industry
linkedin_profile.about:
I've spent several years at Clermont Hotel Group, building my expertise in sales within the hospitality industry. Along the way, I've led teams to hit ambitious targets and drive revenue growth, always keeping Clermont's commitment to excellence at the forefront. My approach combines innovative sales strategies with a focus on customer satisfaction, allowing me to play to my strengths in both sales and hospitality while fostering strong client relationships and delivering exceptional service. As Director of Sales, I've taken on the challenge of elevating sales operations across our iconic properties—The Clermont Victoria, The Clermont Charing Cross, and The Royal Horseguards. In this role, I’m passionate about developing my team, identifying future talent, and helping them grow, all while crafting effective sales initiatives, building key partnerships, and guiding our sales force to capture new market opportunities. My goal is to ensure the Clermont brand continues to stand out for its excellence in the competitive hospitality landscape.

Total Experience: 20 years and 10 months

linkedin_profile.headline: General Manager, Clermont Hotel Group
linkedin_profile.about:
I am an experienced, team-focused manager with comprehensive expertise in all aspects of hotel operations. I excel in leading large, diverse teams across various areas of hospitality, leveraging strong people management skills and quick thinking to effectively navigate any situation. My greatest strengths lie in my interpersonal abilities and my capacity to inspire and guide teams to deliver exceptional results. Career Highlights: The Royal Horseguards Hotel Hotel Manager (August 2021- Present) Hotel Food and Beverage Director (November 2017-August 2021) Sofitel London Heathrow Food and Beverage Director (January 2016-November 2017) Renaissance London Heathrow Food and Beverage Manager Assistant Food and Beverage Manager (January 2011-December 2015) Marriott Gurgaon, India Front Desk Manager Conference and Banqueting Manager (October 2009-January 2011) Marriott Chennai, India Assistant Manager, Food and Beverage (March 2007-October 2009) Starwood Chennai, India Food and Beverage Supervisor (May 2005- March 2007). Specialities: Excellent inter personal skills, Innovative thinker, Vendor management, P&L expert

linkedin_profile.headline: CMgr FCMI | MIH | Cluster General Manager | Chartered Management Institute, Master’s in Strategic Leadership & Management | Hospitality Optimisation Expert
linkedin_profile.about:
Leading with a strategic vision at Clermont Hotel Group, my focus centers on operational excellence and delivering outstanding guest experiences. Enhancing the capital value of properties and driving additional revenue streams through asset enhancement strategies is at the core of my professional ethos. Our team's collaborative efforts led to the successful £240K refurbishment at Thistle Heathrow, which not only elevated customer satisfaction but also contributed to a significant rise in revenue. My tenure at Lamington Group showcases my competency in multisite operations and a commitment to brand growth, where I steered the pre-opening of new sites and fostered a culture of excellence. At the heart of our operations lies a dedication to efficiency, customer experience optimization, and the empowerment of teams that has defined our journey towards setting industry benchmarks.

Total Experience: 22 years and 10 months
